body:
**Actionable comments posted: 2**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@src/lib/avatars.ts`:
- Around line 42-55: The two functions getAvatarDefinitionsDirect and
getAvatarDefinitions duplicate the same prisma.avatarItem.findMany select shape;
extract that select object into a shared constant or a small helper function
(e.g., AVATAR_SELECT or buildAvatarQuery) and have both functions call
prisma.avatarItem.findMany({ select: AVATAR_SELECT }) (or call the helper) so
field changes are maintained in one place; update references to
prisma.avatarItem.findMany in both getAvatarDefinitionsDirect and
getAvatarDefinitions to use the shared selector/helper.

In `@src/lib/booth-scraper/product-creator.ts`:
- Line 79: product-creator.ts currently calls getAvatarDefinitionsDirect() for
every product, causing repeated DB queries; change this by either (A) fetching
avatar definitions once in the caller and passing the array into the product
creation function (replace repeated await getAvatarDefinitionsDirect() calls
with a parameter like avatarDefinitions: AvatarDefinition[]), or (B) add a small
in-memory cache inside getAvatarDefinitionsDirect (introduce module-level
cachedDefinitions and cacheTimestamp with a CACHE_TTL_MS, return
cachedDefinitions when fresh, otherwise refresh from prisma.avatarItem.findMany)
so subsequent calls within the TTL avoid DB queries; update references to
getAvatarDefinitionsDirect and any product-creation functions accordingly.
```

</details>

---

<details>
<summary>ℹ️ Review info</summary>

**Configuration used**: Path: .coderabbit.yaml

**Review profile**: ASSERTIVE

**Plan**: Pro

<details>
<summary>📥 Commits</summary>

Reviewing files that changed from the base of the PR and between 7f42f7e49d962ce884ae947f1142280e2e875496 and ca9a205fd4e5dbde02f4ad56dd54c15e3b3efe40.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📒 Files selected for processing (2)</summary>

* `src/lib/avatars.ts`
* `src/lib/booth-scraper/product-creator.ts`

</details>

</details>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment by CodeRabbit for review status -->

📝 Walkthrough ## Walkthrough `src/lib/avatars.ts`に新しい非キャッシュ関数`getAvatarDefinitionsDirect()`を追加し、データベースから直接アバター定義を取得します。`src/lib/booth-scraper/product-creator.ts`では、この新しい関数を使用するようにインポートを更新します。 ## Changes | コホート / ファイル | 概要 | |---|---| | **アバター定義取得の実装**
`src/lib/avatars.ts` | アバター定義をキャッシュなしでデータベースから直接取得する新しい非同期関数`getAvatarDefinitionsDirect()`を追加。既存のキャッシュされた関数は変更されません。 | | **アバター取得関数の切り替え**
`src/lib/booth-scraper/product-creator.ts` | インポートを`getAvatarDefinitions`から`getAvatarDefinitionsDirect`に置き換え、アバター自動タグ付けロジック内での関数呼び出しを更新。 | ## Estimated code review effort 🎯 1 (Trivial) | ⏱️ ~3 minutes ## Possibly related PRs - **#284** — 同一ファイル（`src/lib/avatars.ts`と`src/lib/booth-scraper/product-creator.ts`）を修正し、アバター定義取得処理を変更する関連PR - **#285** — `avatars.ts`と`product-creator.ts`のアバター自動タグ付けパスを修正し、`suggestedTags`フィールドをアバター定義に追加する関連PR ## Poem > キャッシュを外して素直に取得 🐰 > データベースの声が聞こえる > 新しい道、直線で走る > アバターたちが喜ぶころ
🚥 Pre-merge checks | ✅ 3
✅ Passed checks (3 passed) | Check name | Status | Explanation | | :----------------: | :------- | :----------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | Description Check | ✅ Passed | Check skipped - CodeRabbit’s high-level summary is enabled. | | Title check | ✅ Passed | PRタイトルは、Next.jsのunstable_cacheエラーによるスクレイパーの商品作成失敗の修正という、実装の主要な変更内容を正確に反映しています。 | | Docstring Coverage | ✅ Passed | Docstring coverage is 100.00% which is sufficient. The required threshold is 80.00%. |
✏️ Tip: You can configure your own custom pre-merge checks in the settings.
✨ Finishing Touches - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (stacked PR) - [ ] 📝 Generate docstrings (commit on current branch)
🧪 Generate unit tests (beta) - [ ] Create PR with unit tests - [ ] Post copyable unit tests in a comment - [ ] Commit unit tests in branch `fix/scraper-unstable-cache-error`
